images.caption: Figure 1:Motivation of SWE-Explore. A holistic metric of resolution rate conflates exploration, localization, and patch synthesis. SWE-Explore isolates repository exploration as a line-level evaluation target.

Figure 2:Overview of SWE-Explore. From solution-verified trajectories, SWE-Explore extracts read actions, aggregates them into core and optional context, and evaluates explorers using both upstream exploration metrics and downstream restricted-context validation.

Figure 4:Example of a SWE-Explore instance.Left:an issue plus a repo snapshot with the highlighted core span.Right:trajectory-derived core regionsCcoreC_{\text{core}}(scoring target) and optional regionsCoptC_{\text{opt}}, an explorer’s ranked prediction scored againstCcoreC_{\text{core}}.

Figure 5:Resolve rate as the visible context degrades from the Oracle’s full core setRcoreR_{\text{core}}to eitherα%\alpha\%ofRcoreR_{\text{core}}alone (GT scaling, solid) orα%\alpha\%ofRcoreR_{\text{core}}padded back to full size with random non-core regions (noise injection, dashed).
